svg.aria-label: Mouth diagram with Universal (1-32) and FDI tooth numbers
svg.text: Circled number = Universal (US 1–32) · small number = FDI (used by this app)
Patient's view: their right side is on your left. FDI = quadrant digit (1 UR · 2 UL · 3 LL · 4 LR) + tooth from midline (1 front → 8 back).
